seoTitle: Frankston vs Frankston South — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Frankston and Frankston South. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Frankston vs Frankston South: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Frankston and Frankston South.
heading: Frankston vs Frankston South — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Frankston, Victoria and Frankston South, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Frankston South has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Frankston (32/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Frankston or Frankston South safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Frankston has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Frankston South scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Frankston scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Frankston South scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Frankston or Frankston South?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Frankston South has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.25% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
